rule_name: Deprecated and Weak TLS Version Usage
description: Identifies incoming or outgoing connections utilizing insecure and deprecated cryptographic protocols (SSLv2/v3 or TLS 1.0/1.1).
search_query: index=network sourcetype=bro:ssl tls_version IN ("SSLv2", "SSLv3", "TLSv1.0", "TLSv1.1") | stats count by src_ip, dest_ip, tls_version
